responses.response: Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original packaging — please visit acme.example/returns to start a return. For order #A7729, I can help with billing, shipping, or refund questions; if you have a specific concern about that order, just let me know what you need. As for competitor recommendations, that's outside what I can help with here, but I'm happy to answer any questions about Acme's products or services.

I'm not able to provide legal advice or confirm refund amounts in the context of legal claims — that falls outside what I can assist with. For your refund request, please reach out directly to support@acme.example and our team will handle it from there.

I'd recommend starting with the tracking link in your shipping confirmation email — that gives you the most current status directly from the carrier. If tracking shows no movement for more than two business days, emailing support@acme.example is the fastest next step; include your order number and the carrier tracking number and the team can follow up on your behalf.
